title: List processes
description: Lists running processes with normalized fields.

title: Top elapsed-time processes
description: Ranks processes by elapsed runtime where available.

title: Find process by name
description: Filters processes by exact or partial name.

title: Find process by pid
description: Returns a process matching a pid.

title: Processes over memory threshold
description: Returns processes above a memory threshold.

title: Processes over CPU threshold
description: Returns processes above a CPU threshold.

title: Long-running processes
description: Returns processes with large elapsed time when available.

title: Duplicate process names
description: Shows process names that occur more than once.

title: PID name pairs
description: Returns only pid and name pairs.

title: Process summary
description: Returns counts and totals for process metrics.

title: Process tree guess
description: Sorts by parent-child fields for quick tree analysis.

title: Process stats totals
description: Returns totals across cpu, memory, handles, and threads.

title: Critical process matches
description: Shows currently running critical/system process names.

title: User process candidates
description: Filters out common critical/system process names.

title: Background process candidates
description: Shows non-critical low-window helper style processes by name patterns.

title: Process limit preview
description: Returns a small preview list of processes.

title: Save process snapshot
description: Saves a process snapshot to JSON.

title: Process snapshot hash
description: Hashes a normalized live process snapshot.

title: Export processes to CSV
description: Exports live process list to CSV.

title: Export processes to JSON
description: Exports live process list to JSON.

title: Processes matching allowlist
description: Matches process names against an allowlist.

title: Processes matching blocklist
description: Matches process names against a blocklist.

title: Processes not in allowlist
description: Shows process names not in a provided allowlist.

title: Kill process by pid
description: Terminates a process by pid with confirmation and critical-process guardrails.

title: Kill process by name
description: Terminates one or more processes by name with confirmation and critical-process guardrails.

title: Kill process tree by pid
description: Terminates a process tree by pid where supported.

title: Terminate noncritical by query
description: Preview or terminate noncritical processes matching a query.

title: Find service by name
description: Finds services by exact or partial name.

title: Find service by query
description: Searches services by display or service name.

title: Services matching allowlist
description: Matches service names against an allowlist.

title: Services matching blocklist
description: Matches service names against a blocklist.

title: Services not in allowlist
description: Shows services not present in the allowlist.

title: List startup entries
description: Lists startup entries and launch commands.

title: Find startup entry
description: Searches startup entries by name or command.

title: Find connection by port
description: Finds connections by local or remote port.

title: Find connection by process
description: Finds connections by process name where available.

title: Suspicious remote ports
description: Filters remote connections with uncommon or high ports.

title: Save network snapshot
description: Saves a network snapshot to JSON.

title: System summary
description: Returns OS, host, cpu, memory, and uptime summary.

title: Memory summary
description: Returns total and free memory summary.

title: CPU summary
description: Returns CPU model, count, load averages, and usage hints.

title: OS info
description: Returns platform, release, arch, and temp directory.

title: List temp candidates
description: Lists temp files under the temp directory.

title: Temp candidates older than days
description: Lists temp files older than N days.

title: Clear temp candidates
description: Deletes selected temp files with confirmation and dry-run support.

title: Approval requirements report
description: Lists which tools require confirmation or dry-run.

title: Registry search
description: Searches the tool registry by id, title, description, tags, or intents.

title: Tool detail
description: Returns one tool definition by id.

title: Playbook detail
description: Returns a playbook definition by id.

title: Safe mode report
description: Shows safe read-only tools by category.

title: Preflight for process action
description: Runs policy checks before a process-kill action.

title: Preflight for service action
description: Runs policy checks before a service action.
